chunks: Agents will pay other agents for research, data, code, and API-backed work.
But when a seller says 'done,' the buyer only sees the result — not the execution.

sentences.text: Agents will pay other agents for research, data, code, and API-backed work.
But when a seller says 'done,' the buyer only sees the result — not the execution.

chunks: Did it call the promised model?
Did it use the right API?
Or did it replace the work with a cheaper shortcut?

sentences.text: Did it call the promised model?
Did it use the right API?
Or did it replace the work with a cheaper shortcut?

chunks: TyrPay turns agent payments into verifiable settlement.
Funds can move only through commitment, proof,
and verification enforced by contracts on 0G Chain.

sentences.text: TyrPay turns agent payments into verifiable settlement.
Funds can move only through commitment, proof, and verification enforced by contracts on 0G Chain.

chunks: Before funds move, the seller commits to the model, endpoint,
usage, deadline, and proof mode.
The commitment hash is recorded by the TyrPay contract on 0G Chain.

sentences.text: Before funds move, the seller commits to the model, endpoint, usage, deadline, and proof mode.
The commitment hash is recorded by the TyrPay contract on 0G Chain.

chunks: The buyer accepts the commitment and locks funds
into the TyrPay contract on 0G Chain.
The seller has not been paid yet.

sentences.text: The buyer accepts the commitment and locks funds into the TyrPay contract on 0G Chain.
The seller has not been paid yet.

chunks: Now the seller executes through TyrPay's default proof path: 0G teeTLS.
The call produces a signed receipt bound to the provider,
the request hash, and the response hash.
For higher-assurance cases, TyrPay also provides zkTLS mode
for stricter cryptographic proof of the API interaction.

sentences.text: Now the seller executes through TyrPay's default proof path: 0G teeTLS.
The call produces a signed receipt bound to the provider, the request hash, and the response hash.
For higher-assurance cases, TyrPay also provides zkTLS mode for stricter cryptographic proof of the API interaction.

chunks: The full proof bundle is stored on 0G Storage.
The 0G Chain contract only keeps the proof hash, storage reference,
commitment state, and escrow state.

sentences.text: The full proof bundle is stored on 0G Storage.
The 0G Chain contract only keeps the proof hash, storage reference, commitment state, and escrow state.

chunks: The verifier checks whether the payment conditions were met:
proof validity, provider match, task binding, commitment match,
usage, deadline, replay protection, and proof availability on 0G Storage.
TyrPay does not judge answer quality.
It verifies committed execution.

sentences.text: The verifier checks whether the payment conditions were met: proof validity, provider match, task binding, commitment match, usage, deadline, replay protection, and proof availability on 0G Storage.
TyrPay does not judge answer quality.
It verifies committed execution.

chunks: If the proof passes, the TyrPay contract on 0G Chain
releases escrow to the seller.
If proof fails or times out, the buyer is refunded.

sentences.text: If the proof passes, the TyrPay contract on 0G Chain releases escrow to the seller.
If proof fails or times out, the buyer is refunded.

chunks: TyrPay is verifiable Agent settlement on 0G:
settlement contracts on 0G Chain, proof archives on 0G Storage,
0G teeTLS as the native proof path, and zkTLS for higher-assurance cases.

sentences.text: TyrPay is verifiable Agent settlement on 0G: settlement contracts on 0G Chain, proof archives on 0G Storage, 0G teeTLS as the native proof path, and zkTLS for higher-assurance cases.
